name: JOOLA Tour Elite Pro Duffel
description: The JOOLA Tour Elite Pro Duffel is built for the serious competitor who needs maximum organization. Fits up to 6 paddles with individual protective sleeves, has a ventilated shoe compartment, thermal-lined drink pocket, and a rigid base to keep the bag upright on the court.
care_instructions: Spot clean the exterior with a damp cloth. Remove the ventilated shoe divider and wash separately. The rigid base can be wiped down with a disinfecting wipe.
